description_long: This is a luxurious gold wristwatch with a polished metal band and a round, silver-toned dial. The watch face features three subdials, slim gold hour markers, and two pushers along with a crown on the right side, indicating chronograph functionality. The bracelet is composed of interlocking rectangular links, giving it a robust yet elegant appearance. The case and band are highly reflective, suggesting a premium finish, and the clasp is integrated seamlessly into the band. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a minimalist approach to ornamentation. No gemstones or additional decorative elements are present, emphasizing a refined, geometric motif.
description: A gold wristwatch with a silver dial, three subdials, and a polished metal link band. The design is sleek, modern, and minimalist, with no gemstones or elaborate decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round silver dial, gold hour markers, three subdials, and the full face of the watch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers on the right side, as well as the profile of the metal band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clasp and the interlocking rectangular links of the band, with the back of the case visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left profile of the case and the continuous curve of the metal band.
